c74object.name: airfx.xbandpass~
c74object.digest: XBandpass is a distorted digital EQ, inspired by retro sampler DSP.
c74object.description: XBandpass is a distorted digital EQ, inspired by retro sampler DSP.
c74object.discussion: Hi! This is the bandpass version of the X series Airwindows filters. If you know what a bandpass is you can probably figure out what’s going on here. More detail in the other filter types: the X filters mean experimental, and they're also written before I was interpolating coefficients, so these filters may produce zipper noise when adjusting them on the fly. However, that also means they are more CPU-efficient: it's a tradeoff.

method.name: about
method.digest: Get the original Airwindows "about" text for this object
method.description: Prints the original Airwindows description for this plugin out the dump outlet.
